author: @ffaubert1
text: Once you have the corner peeled, spray some WD-40 or Windex on it. It should change the adhesive's chemical structure and help it debond. Works on removing window tint from your car as well.

author: @nitrousman8882
text: funny, this is a tactic used on the TAC sunglasses commercials.... showing the 'miracle' of being able to see an American Flag in an LCD monitor that has had one of it's polarizing screens removed.  Like the old OxyClean commercials.... put the cleaner into a redish-colored tank of water with a white sheet in it.... it   quickly goes clear.... any guess what the 'stain' is from?  :)

author: @ecospider5
text: LG 3D TVs us 2 opposite polarized lenses in their glasses. So does 3D movie theaters. So you should be able to take 2 sets of glasses and figure out if you need to use both right lenses or both left lenses for a set of polarized glasses.
